description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a smooth, slightly glossy orange surface and a prominent, upright beige stem. The front of the pumpkin features a carved pattern resembling stylized letters or symbols, deeply etched into the rind. The carving appears to be abstract or possibly text-based, with angular and geometric cutouts. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is uncarved and unadorned, showing the natural ribbing and coloration typical of a healthy pumpkin. The stem is thick and textured, providing a natural handle-like feature. There are no visible accessories or additional decorations attached to the pumpkin.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a beige stem and a carved abstract or text-like pattern on its front. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with no additional decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved abstract or text-like pattern and the full stem.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the carving and the curvature of the pumpkin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, smooth orange surface and the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the edge of the carving and the pumpkin's roundness.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin features a carved pattern on its front, consisting of angular, geometric shapes that resemble stylized letters or symbols. The carving is deep and bold, with no traditional face or animal motifs, giving it an abstract or text-based appearance.
